hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); [ -z "$CMD" ] && exit 0; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "(^|;\s*|&&\s*|\|\|\s*|\|\s*)rm\s" && echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "(^|\s)-[a-zA-Z]*[rR]|--recursive" && echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "(^|\s)-[a-zA-Z]*[fF]|--force"; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive rm -rf detected. Use targeted deletes instead." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'CMD=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); [ -z "$CMD" ] && exit 0; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+push.*(main|master)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Do not push directly to main/master. Use feature branches." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'CMD=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); [ -z "$CMD" ] && exit 0; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "(curl|wget).*\|.*bash"; then echo "BLOCKED: Piping downloads to bash is dangerous." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.py$"; then if command -v ruff &>/dev/null; then ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi'
